title: Cognitive Episodes in LLM Reasoning Traces Enable Interpretable Human Item Difficulty Prediction
innovation_summary: Cognitive Episodes in LLM Reasoning Traces Enable Interpretable Human Item Difficulty Prediction: To this end, we introduce Epi2Diff (Episode to Difficulty), a framework that maps LRM reasoning traces into cognitively grounded episode sequences.
